feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: I never saw a kazakh kyrgyz couple in my life, this is strange because I live ne…
entry.content: I never saw a kazakh kyrgyz couple in my life, this is strange because I live near the border, Kyrgyz and Kazakhs look basically the same and I also saw Kyrgyz people (mostly in construction) so it's kinda bizzare for me. Do you also have very similar people with whom you intermarry the least?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Japanese government to propose allowing warrantless communications interception
entry.content: >The ruling Liberal Democratic Party plans to propose having the government introduce a system that would allow, for security purposes, administrative agencies to intercept private communications without a court warrant, informed sources said Thursday. >Wiretapping is currently permitted only for criminal investigations under the wiretapping law, which took effect in 2000, and is known as “judicial interception.” >By contrast, administrative interception refers to the interception of private com
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I came here to die on a hill today. THE WISHES HAVE CONSEQUENCES. >guy on the on…
entry.content: I came here to die on a hill today. THE WISHES HAVE CONSEQUENCES. >guy on the online form, his mother wished for beauty now her son is attracted to her >Bears wish obviously >Shop owner was in the good stages of his wish, so we don't see his consequences yet. >Ian's wish leading him over to Bear's excited about the billion dollars when Nikki had the gun. The larger the wish the faster the consequences. >Theory: Sarah made a wish off screen to get into college, after she acknowledges the envelope
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >buy chair from amazon (spent like $240 usd) >it arrives manufactured incorrectl…
entry.content: >buy chair from amazon (spent like $240 usd) >it arrives manufactured incorrectly (the part you lie your back on is in the middle of the chair instead of the back so sitting on the chair feels like your sitting on a 6inch ledge and it feels like you can slip off the seat at any second) >have to spend my entire monday requesting a refund due to basically being ripped off, taking the chair apart, putting it back in the box, and sending it wherever id need to send it great, awesome. i fucking love
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2996
entry.content: >Gouda Chest Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84045147/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Casualties Unknown Storytime Thread: Postem
entry.content: >multiplayer mod to test out skin changer >host actual game because dont know how to go into sandbox with mp on >works great, equip milky skin >decide to do one layer for the fuck of it >not taking this seriously at all like my sp run >spine broken by spike trap, forgot to enable sleeping, spend half of layer as cripple with depression >three crates in order, balaclava, heroin, and small mag >find other milky trader, sells gun and lrd, work hard to scavenge layer to get both >find something to p

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: StarFox for Switch 2
entry.content: Overall, I like it, I just think whoever decided that the laser and bomb buttons should be on opposite sides of the face button should be fired and never work in the games industry ever again. Did anyone else pick this up? One of the major things I like is the little narrative explanations for the route splits. The Sector Y fleet being sent to reinforce the Katina outpost is kind of how I always figured it would go down.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: New Owner of the Fallout Franchise Interviews
entry.content: Josh Sawyer, who now owns Fallout, has done interviews where he talks about his plans for FNV2 on his youtube channel. Here are some relevant points. >How do you feel about the Fallout IP and other worlds you helped create? >"I know this will sound crazy to some people, but I don't care *laughs*. It's not mine, it was never mine. That's my mentality with all the stuff that I do. I don't have control over the IP that I develop while working for another company. I'm certainly able to give my opini
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How secure is Andriod these days
entry.content: >inb4 jamal Just wondering how far andriod has come in terms of being secure, works had me on an iphone for a long time. I'm traveling abroad and want a personal device with me, google fi has some cheap deals but all are Android (moto g 2026) which looks to be andriod 16. How far has security on it come along? Last real device I had was 6.0 and I recall tons of lock screen exploits to bypass. Assuming I do a 6 digit pin and side finger print sensor style phone, if someone were to yank it take ou
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: TMZ: HE WAS JUST FOUND
entry.content: Twitter leaked the awful news and now TMZ all but confirming, link below >"Heaven has gained an angel, but the world has just lost a legendary funnyman. It is reported that the beloved former Saturday night alum and Osmosis Jones star was found responsive in his Palo Alto home early Sunday by a housekeeper. No official statements from family or Palo Alto County Offices, but insider chatter points towards a private personal battle with an undisclosed matter. The comedian actor was 75.” Damn, way
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why is this game so over complicated and confusing for a new player to get into?…

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Led Zeppelin III [Atlantic, 1970] If the great blues guitarists can make their i…
entry.content: Led Zeppelin III [Atlantic, 1970] If the great blues guitarists can make their instruments cry out like human voices, it's only fitting that Robert Plant should make his voice galvanize like an electric guitar. I've always approved theoretically of the formula that pits the untiring freak intensity of that voice against Jimmy Page's repeated low-register fuzz riffs, and here they really whip it into shape. Plant is overpowering even when Page goes to his acoustic, as he does to great effect on s
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: AI is advancing at a ridiculous pace. 3 years ago those LLMs couldn't solve basi…
entry.content: AI is advancing at a ridiculous pace. 3 years ago those LLMs couldn't solve basic math problems, now they are solving big open problems in combinatorics and acing the math olympics reliably. 2 years ago they could barely code a simple game, AI coding was telling the dumb machine over and over to correct a mistake and it would be incapable of fixing the mistake without making like 3-4 new mistakes. And now they are pretty decent devs, finding exploits in software who was deemed safe by experts fo
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random
